reviews.review_description: Brilliant game
How do you pass this level?
I am enjoying this game  but I am stuck at level 67    What’s the trick /tip for this level

developer_response.body: Hey - just played this level, it is tough, I finished on the last marble.  You need to focus on taking the most efficient shots, use the bomb on the far edges of the wood roots and pop the black right in the middle of the root, so then one shot with the light blues in the middle can pop a bunch.

reviews.review_description:
I have 200 games & apps on my Quest and this is my favourite thing I have. Weird? A marble popping game? Really? Yep. It’s so well done and polished. It’s my go to when I want to relax but still keep engaged. There are a ton of levels and the graphics, though simple, are bright and really pop out in 3-D. You can bring up an internet browser while you play and position it anywhere you want. I hang it in the air beside me, put on some YouTube music, sit back on a raft on an animated ocean and pop puzzles until my stress for the day is gone. 
Meditation apps I find too boring to use and not engaging enough to keep my mind off my troubles. With this game I’m able to relax, yet still have fun.
I highly recommend it.

Devs, if you were to try to improve on it, I’d say have more little touches like animal interactions. Birds quickly swooping in front of the puzzle occasionally maybe. Just little flourishes to add more smiles. 
(I love the animals, though the constant splashing of the Orca is a bit much)
Personally I’d lose the timed levels, too stressful, but I get people would like the challenge. 
If there’s one complaint? Eventually I’ll run out of levels and I’ll be sad about it. DLC packs would ease that sadness. You want people to be happy right? 

Get this game people!
Can you add mixed reality?

Great game, a lot of fun!!!!
Thank you!!!

reviews.review_title: Casual and a "Blast" to pass time with
reviews.review_description: Much like a bubble popping game you might play on your phone but with a beautiful lush environment. Great way to kill time and its amazing that its free.

reviews.review_title: Have it for free feels like you stole it
reviews.review_description:
As entitled, it is that polished and good, with greats nice to have like browser integration for music or podcasts, tutorial, replayability with star score system, transforming beautiful backgrounds as you play, etc. etc.

I definitely owe the devs to pay for their next game :-)
I saw a YouTube review of the game so downloaded it and am very pleased i did.
So much fun. Kills time when ur bored
Love this and so glad they just released another level...keep them coming!!

It's quite incredible that it's free, the detail and gameplay are amazing.
I wouldn't call it relaxing though, as it gets quite hard quite quickly. I've now been stuck for days, and am losing interest a bit because there's no way to move forward. One or two free passes wouldn't hurt, or perhaps those could be collected along the way. 
There is something on the game start screen that looks like it could be bonuses, but at least half way through level three with levels 1 & 2 completed with full stars, I haven't gained any.
Still it's great fun!
Edit: the game has been updated and made somewhat easier by apparently removing the timed challenges. The visuals have been made even better too. 
I would still like to see an option to skip a task or two  when you're stuck playing the  same one over and over again. Also it would be nice to know what the symbols on the game start screen are.
Keep coming back to this game every time I fire up my Quest 2.  Love it.

This game has a crazy number of levels, and will occupy you for hours and hours for sure.  It even has a browser built in so you can listen to music while you play.

There are a few things that are a bit rough around the edges: some framerate drops on certain levels, a difficulty level that really ramps up after about 35 levels or so (iirc), and a gameplay dynamic on a few levels that changes the balls back and forth... just makes for a lot of standing and waiting.

At free, it's 100% worth a pickup.  At $10 or $15 it would still be great value I say.

The graphics and gameplay are awesome. Most games I have looked at along these lines have timers that you have to beat. This one does not. You can take your time, plot your strategy over many different levels, and enjoy the phenomenal landscape. You are sitting on water and all kinds of realistic things surround you. I saw a shark swim by on one level. The graphics are not blocky or low res, they are beautiful and realistic. Even if you don't like these type of games, it's worth giving this one a try just for the scenery. Another thing, there are rewards for completing levels like getting great looking fireworks that you can shoot wherever you please.

Loved the gameplay and physics. So simple but gets very challenging after about 30 levels. I’ve been looking for fun & challenging games to play where I don’t have to stand and this one is the best I’ve seen in this genre so far! Excited to see what additional features the devs add over time. New level packs, new upgrades and more gun skins could be fun. Would definitely recommend, especially if you like games that make you think.
Loved that we can put our YouTube music on the background while we play. A lot of special shoots that make it more interesting. Great game to relax and to forget time.

I like the game, but I highly recommend a setting which puts the blaster automatically in your hand. The reason is for some people like my parents it is difficult to pick up the blaster by moving the hand into it, pressing and holding the side button and finding the Y button to lock it. I always need to help before they can enjoy the game. Clicking the fire button on the other controller then should switch the controller to that hand, so that is still possible to choose hands.
And maybe a relaxing mode without time limit and limited shots for the same target group.

developer_response.body:
Hey - thanks for the kind words - we really appreciate it.

We just made a huge new update with awesome new visuals, also we adjusted the levels and the special marbles to improve the difficulty ramp.  We have completely removed the time limit levels and the whole game should be a lot more relaxing.  We completely agree with your feedback, I know personally I would feel my mood shift when I got to a time limit level.  

We would love for you to try out the update.  We are really trying to listen to our players feedback and make it a 5 star game for all!

Also, we hear you on making the blaster easier to pick up, that is definitely something we will work into a future update.

reviews.review_description: Hopefully someday I can pass level 14, 15, 16, maybe I need new rubber bands

If you looking for a game to just relax this is it you playing the game plus you can hear music from YouTube very relaxing i do play bubbles games on my phone but this is another world love it i think is ready to get out !!
